MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ALICIA SOLIS MOTION TO DISMISS.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Alicia Perez Solis' motion to dismiss her individual claims with prejudice and her representative claims on behalf of aggrieved parties without prejudice is granted on the condition that Plaintiff's counsel provide written notice to the LWDA of the dismissal of the representative claims.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
